name: Documentation feedback
about: Feedback on a guide, theory page, or post — clarity, gaps, structure, or suggestions.
title: "[feedback] <page title> — <short summary>"
labels: [documentation, feedback]
---

Thanks for reviewing Overstorey! Use this for general feedback on content:
something unclear, missing, mis-structured, or an idea for improvement.
For an outright error in the science, code, or a figure, use the
"Content accuracy / model drift" template instead.
-->
